reviews.comment:
Cargamos combustible y seguimos hacia Chalten. Es recomendable cargar si ésta en un viaje de muchos kilómetros sin estación de servicio. Lo recomiendo.

(Translated by Google)
We filled up with fuel and continued on to El Chaltén. It's advisable to fill up if you're on a long trip without a gas station. I recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXaFBlVnR3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Llegamos de noche.
No hay mucha variedad para cenar.
Esta todo muy lejos y mucha distancia.

(Translated by Google)
We arrived at night.
There isn't much choice for dinner.
Everything is very far away.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXdU12Q0Z3EAE

reviews.comment:
Los baños sucios, una pena, lo demás, muy bueno

(Translated by Google)
The bathrooms were dirty, which was a shame, but everything else was very good.
